title: 'Fear, Corruption, Lies': Amit Shah Sounds Bengal Poll Bugle, Unveils BJP's Chargesheet Against Mamata's TMC Govt | Key Points
description: Ahead of polls, Amit Shah criticised Mamata Banerjee's leadership, accusing her of fostering a politics of lies, violence, and corruption over the past 15 years. He added that people of Bengal want relief from this situation.
